extName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome UI.

extDesc.message: Open-source screenshot tool — full-page, region, and visible-area capture with annotation and PDF export.
extDesc.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store and extensions page.

modeFullPage.description: Capture mode: capture the entire scrolling page.

modeFullPageSub.description: Subtitle for the Full Page capture mode.

modeVisible.description: Capture mode: capture what is currently visible.

modeVisibleSub.description: Subtitle for the Visible Area capture mode.

modeRegion.description: Capture mode: capture a user-dragged region.

modeRegionSub.description: Subtitle for the Selected Region capture mode.

capturing.description: Status shown while a capture is in progress.

cannotCaptureProtected.description: Error shown when the active page cannot be captured (e.g. chrome:// pages).

comingSoon.description: Placeholder message for features not yet implemented.

welcomeLede.message: Capture full-length screenshots of any webpage — even long-scrolling pages — annotate them, and export as PNG or PDF.

welcomeList1.message: 📄 Full Page — Scroll & stitch the entire page, top to bottom

welcomeList2.message: 👁 Visible — Just what you see now

welcomeList3.message: ✂️ Region — Drag to select an area

welcomePerm.message: 🔒 We need permission to read page content for screenshots. Your data never leaves your device.

welcomeCta.description: Primary call-to-action on the welcome card.

customizeShortcuts.description: Link that opens Chrome's extension shortcut settings.

filenameHint.description: Help text for filename template tokens.

pdfPageSizeFull.description: Full page size option (auto-sized to image).

pdfFullHint.message: Full sizes the page to the image, so these don’t apply.
pdfFullHint.description: Hint when Full page size is selected.

couldNotReach.message: Could not reach the background worker.
couldNotReach.description: Error toast when the background service worker is unreachable.

backAria.description: Accessible label for the back button in settings.

captureModesAria.description: Accessible label for the capture mode buttons.
